maml:description.maml:para: Bypass TLS certificate validation. On Windows PowerShell 5.1 this installs a process-wide ServicePointManager callback.
Bypass TLS certificate validation. On Windows PowerShell 5.1 this installs a process-wide ServicePointManager callback.

command:example.maml:title: -------------------------- Example 1 --------------------------
command:example.dev:code: PS C:\> {{ Add example code here }}

maml:description.maml:para: Clears the cached VSPC session state.

Nulls $Script:VeeamSPCConnection so subsequent cmdlets fail fast with 'Use Connect-VeeamSPC first.' Does not call any logout endpoint - the VSPC Bearer token is server-issued and stateless on the client side.

command:example.maml:title: -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
command:example.dev:code: Disconnect-VeeamSPC

command:example.maml:title: -------------------------- Example 1 --------------------------
command:example.dev:code: PS C:\> {{ Add example code here }}

command:example.maml:title: -------------------------- Example 1 --------------------------
command:example.dev:code: PS C:\> {{ Add example code here }}

maml:description.maml:para: Returns a collection resource representation of all Veeam Backup & Replication servers.
Returns a collection resource representation of all Veeam Backup & Replication servers.

command:example.maml:title: -------------------------- Example 1 --------------------------
command:example.dev:code: PS C:\> Get-VeeamSPCBackupRepository

dev:remarks.maml:para: Returns a collection resource representation of all Veeam Backup & Replication servers.

maml:description.maml:para: Activate Backup Agent Changes management mode of a Veeam backup agent with the specified UID to ManagedByConsole.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

command:example.maml:title: -------------------------- Example 1 --------------------------
command:example.dev:code: PS C:\> Initialize-VeeamSPCBackupAgent -backupAgentUid $Agent.instanceUid

dev:remarks.maml:para: Sets the backup agent to managed mode activation

maml:description.maml:para: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

command:example.maml:title: -------------------------- Example 1 --------------------------
command:example.dev:code: PS C:\> {{ Add example code here }}

maml:description.maml:para: Credentials for the company portal owner account.
Numeric VSPC country code. Defaults to 1 (USA).
Free-form notes attached to the organization record.
Optional reseller UID this company belongs to.
Enable VSPC REST API access for this tenant.
Enable VSPC alarm detection for this tenant.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Credentials for the company portal owner account.
Numeric VSPC country code. Defaults to 1 (USA).
Free-form notes attached to the organization record.
Optional reseller UID this company belongs to.
Enable VSPC REST API access for this tenant.
Enable VSPC alarm detection for this tenant.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

command:example.maml:title: -------------------------- Example 1 --------------------------
command:example.dev:code: PS C:\> {{ Add example code here }}

maml:description.maml:para: Allocate a new cloud backup resource to a company with the specified UID.
Allocate a new cloud backup resource to a company with the specified UID.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

command:example.maml:title: -------------------------- Example 1 --------------------------
command:example.dev:code: PS C:\> $RepoSplat = @{ companyUid = $Company.instanceUid siteUid = $Site.siteUid repositoryUid = $Repo.instanceUid cloudRepositoryName = $Repo.name storageQuota = 1TB isDefault = $true } New-VeeamSPCCompanyBackupResource @RepoSplat

dev:remarks.maml:para: Assigns a repository as a backup resource for a company/site. Give it a quota and set it as default.

maml:description.maml:para: UID of the company this tenant belongs to.
Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
